ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "mean_commentscore" REAL /* Average score of comments on the post */,
  "post_score" INTEGER /* Score of the post */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "title_length" INTEGER /* Length of the post title in characters */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the post was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Full text of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, link, image) */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted, reported) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the post was updated */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the post is pinned to the top of the community */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether comments are locked on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator managing the community */,
  "community_type" TEXT /* Type of community (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "subscription_required" INTEGER /* Whether a subscription is required to join the community */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the community */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the community (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the community was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communities_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "karma_score" INTEGER /* User's reputation score */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last date and time the user was active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community the moderator manages */,
  "mod_since" TEXT /* Date the user became a moderator */,
  "moderator_status" TEXT /* Status of the moderator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "moderator_level" TEXT /* Level of moderator (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_score" INTEGER /* Score of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted, reported) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the comment was updated */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is pinned to the top of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the metrics are for */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the post */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the post */,
  "total_reactions" INTEGER /* Total number of reactions for the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate for the post (calculated as a percentage) */,
  "total_upvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of upvotes for the post */,
  "total_downvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of downvotes for the post */,
  "total_reports" INTEGER /* Total number of reports for the post */,
  "total_saves" INTEGER /* Total number of saves for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, share, reaction) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post involved in the activity (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment involved in the activity (if applicable) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., comment text, reaction type) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community the rule applies to */,
  "rule_text" TEXT /* Text of the rule or guideline */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rule was created */,
  "rule_status" TEXT /* Status of the rule (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the rule was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_rules_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)
